note: Created fragmentation_concurrency.rs with 10 integration tests (20 total including harness tests). Tests cover: large payload (4096B) roundtrip through tunnel, various payload sizes around MTU boundary, bidirectional large payloads, IP fragment header preservation (MF flag + offset), fragment sequence preservation, multiple concurrent UDP sockets through tunnel, bidirectional concurrent UDP, rapid sequential sends (100 packets), rapid alternating direction sends, rapid large payload sends, and rapid UDP-through-tunnel sends. All 20 tests pass.
